technology.title: The Chinese whiz kids of Silicon Valley
technology.summary: Chinese-born tech workers have fueled Silicon Valley for decades. In the AI era, they're superstars.

briefing.news_focus: Chinese-born tech workers have fueled Silicon Valley for decades. In the AI era, they're superstars.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國出生的科技工作者在矽谷的發展歷程中扮演了重要角色，尤其在人工智慧（AI）時代，他們更是成為了業界的明星。這些技術人才不僅在創新和技術推動上貢獻良多，還在全球科技產業中占據了舉足輕重的地位。
briefing.background: 矽谷作為全球科技創新的中心，吸引了來自世界各地的科技人才。中國出生的科技工作者在這一領域中歷史悠久，許多知名企業的創始人和高管均是中國裔。隨著人工智慧技術的迅速發展，這些人才的影響力愈加顯著，許多中國科技工作者在AI研究、開發及應用方面展現出卓越的能力，推動了行業的進步和變革。
briefing.analysis: 中國科技工作者在矽谷的成功不僅反映了他們的專業技能，也顯示了全球化背景下人才流動的趨勢。這些人才的崛起可能會引發其他國家對於科技人才的競爭，特別是在AI等新興技術領域。儘管目前並未有其他報導提供不同的觀點或細節，但可以預見，隨著AI技術的進一步發展，中國科技工作者的角色將持續受到關注，並可能引發關於科技倫理、知識產權及國際合作的討論。

technology.title: Rubio defends new U.S. sanctions on Cuba, targeting military-run conglomerate GAESA
technology.summary: Established in the 1990s under military control, GAESA was the Cuban Armed Forces' strategic response to the economic collapse that followed the Soviet Union's fall and the tightening of U.S. sanctions in place at the time

briefing.news_focus: Established in the 1990s under military control, GAESA was the Cuban Armed Forces' strategic response to the economic collapse that followed the Soviet Union's fall and the tightening of U.S. sanctions in place at the time
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國參議員馬可·魯比奧（Marco Rubio）為新一輪針對古巴的制裁辯護，這次制裁主要針對由古巴軍方控制的財團GAESA。該財團成立於1990年代，旨在應對蘇聯解體後的經濟崩潰及當時美國制裁的加強。此舉顯示美國政府對古巴軍方經濟利益的持續關注與打擊。
briefing.background: GAESA（古巴軍事企業集團）自成立以來，一直在古巴經濟中扮演重要角色，尤其是在旅遊、建設及其他行業。隨著美國對古巴的制裁政策持續，GAESA的影響力也隨之增強。美國政府過去曾針對古巴的經濟活動進行制裁，特別是針對與軍方有關的企業，這些制裁旨在削弱古巴政府的財政基礎，並促進政治變革。此次新制裁的推出，反映出美國對古巴軍方企業的持續施壓，並試圖限制其在經濟上的擴張。
briefing.analysis: 此次制裁的具體新增內容在於針對GAESA的直接打擊，這是美國政府在古巴政策上進一步升級的表現。與先前的制裁相比，這次措施更具針對性，旨在直接削弱軍方對經濟的控制。這一行動可能會引發古巴政府的強烈反應，並使得美國與古巴之間的緊張關係進一步加劇。此外，這也可能影響到古巴國內的經濟活動，特別是在旅遊業及其他依賴軍方企業的領域。各方觀察者可能會關注此舉是否會促使古巴政府進行政治改革，或是加強其對外部壓力的抵抗。

technology.title: CUDA Proves Nvidia Is a Software Company
technology.summary: There’s a deep, forbidding moat that surrounds Nvidia—and it has nothing to do with hardware.

briefing.news_focus: There’s a deep, forbidding moat that surrounds Nvidia—and it has nothing to do with hardware.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Nvidia的CUDA技術顯示出該公司已經不僅僅是一家硬體製造商，而是轉型為一家以軟體為核心的公司。這一發展表明Nvidia在市場中的競爭優勢主要來自其軟體生態系統，而非僅依賴其知名的顯示卡產品。
briefing.background: Nvidia長期以來以其高效能的顯示卡聞名，特別是在遊戲和人工智慧領域。然而，隨著市場需求的變化，Nvidia開始重視其軟體產品，特別是CUDA，這是一個讓開發者能夠利用其硬體加速計算的平臺。這一轉變反映了科技產業中軟體與硬體融合的趨勢，並且顯示出Nvidia在技術創新和市場定位上的靈活性。
briefing.analysis: Nvidia的轉型為軟體公司意味著其未來的增長將更多依賴於軟體服務和生態系統的擴展，而不僅僅是硬體銷售。這樣的策略可能會吸引更多的開發者和企業客戶，進一步鞏固其市場地位。與此同時，Porsche的報導則顯示出另一種企業策略，即專注於核心業務並削減不必要的子公司。這反映了在當前經濟環境中，企業必須靈活調整其業務模式以應對市場挑戰。雖然兩者的焦點不同，但都強調了企業在面對變化時的適應能力和策略調整的重要性。

supporting_titles: Porsche shutters e-bike, battery, software subsidiaries as part of company overhaul
supporting_summaries: More than 500 people will be affected by the closures. “We must refocus on our core business,” Porsche CEO and executive chair Michael Leiters said in a statement. "This is the indispensable foundation for a successful strategic realignment. This forces us to make painful cuts — including our subsidiaries."

politics.title: Democrats are playing with fire in trying to reclaim tax cuts from Republicans
politics.summary: Senator Chris Van Hollen and other Democratic lawmakers are embracing a policy that hardly benefits the middle class Soul-searching within the Democratic party is to be expected after its loss in the 2024 election. Donald Trump’s edge over Kamala Harris in voters’ perceptions of economic competence (perplexing though it now appears following a year of erratic policymaking) was bound to inspire a call to rethink the party platform. Yet the second-guessing is steering the Democrats down a dangerous path to embracing a tax-cutting strategy that risks defeating the project to enable a healthier, more equitable society. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Senator Chris Van Hollen and other Democratic lawmakers are embracing a policy that hardly benefits the middle class Soul-searching within the Democratic party is to be expected after its loss in the 2024 election. Donald Trump’s edge over Kamala Harris in voters’ perceptions of economic competence (perplexing though it now appears following a year of erratic policymaking) was bound to inspire a call to rethink the party platform. Yet the second-guessing is steering the Democrats down a dangerous path to embracing a tax-cutting strategy that risks defeating the project to enable a healthier, more equitable society. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國民主黨在2024年選舉失利後，參議員克里斯·范霍倫及其他民主黨立法者正考慮重新評估稅收政策，特別是試圖從共和黨手中奪回稅收減免。儘管這一策略旨在改善中產階級的經濟狀況，但批評者認為這可能會危及民主黨推動更健康、更公平社會的計畫，並可能導致黨內更深層的分歧。
briefing.background: 民主黨在2024年選舉中的失利引發了對其政策的反思，尤其是在經濟表現方面，黨內對於如何重新獲得選民信任的討論愈加激烈。參議員范霍倫的提議是試圖透過稅收減免來吸引中產階級選民，這一策略在過去的選舉中曾被共和黨廣泛使用。然而，這也引發了黨內對於是否應該繼續推動社會公平與經濟正義的辯論，因為這可能與稅收減免的目標相悖。
briefing.analysis: 民主黨內部對於稅收政策的重新評估顯示出其面臨的兩難局面。一方面，試圖通過稅收減免來吸引選民，可能會被視為對中產階級的關注，但另一方面，這一策略可能削弱黨內對於推動社會公平的承諾。批評者擔心，這樣的政策轉變可能會使民主黨失去其核心支持者，並在長期內損害其形象。特別是在經濟不確定性加劇的背景下，選民對於經濟管理的信心可能成為影響未來選舉結果的關鍵因素。民主黨是否能夠找到一個平衡點，將決定其未來的政治走向。

politics.title: Trump's China visit set to test fragile truce
politics.summary: The first US presidential visit to China in almost 10 years will test a fragile tariff truce.

briefing.news_focus: The first US presidential visit to China in almost 10 years will test a fragile tariff truce.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國前總統特朗普即將進行近十年來首度訪問中國，此行將對脆弱的關稅休戰進行考驗。此次訪問的背景是在美中貿易緊張局勢下，雙方在關稅政策上達成的暫時共識，特朗普的行程可能影響未來的貿易談判與雙邊關係。
briefing.background: 美中貿易關係在過去幾年中經歷了劇烈波動，特別是在特朗普任內，兩國之間的關稅政策引發了廣泛的經濟影響。隨著特朗普的訪問，外界關注他是否會重申對中國的貿易立場，或是尋求進一步的合作。此行的背景是雙方在某些領域達成的脆弱共識，然而，這種共識是否能夠持續仍然存在不確定性，特別是在全球經濟不穩定的情況下。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的訪問可能會成為檢驗美中貿易關係的一個重要時刻。若他在訪問中強調合作，可能有助於穩定雙邊關係，進一步促進貿易。然而，若他重申強硬立場，則可能導致關稅政策的重新評估，甚至引發新的貿易摩擦。各方利益關係複雜，企業界希望看到穩定的貿易環境，而政治界則可能因選舉考量而採取不同立場。特朗普的行程能否促進實質對話，將是未來幾周的關鍵觀察點。

politics.title: Disappearances in Mexico involving state at ‘alarming’ rate, says report
politics.summary: Exclusive: Human rights group warns of ‘deep collusion’ between criminals and officials in some parts of country State actors are involved in disappearances in Mexico at an “alarming” rate, according to a report from the Inter-American Commission on Human Rights (IACHR). The sweeping investigation, to which the Guardian was given exclusive access, presents a dire picture of the crisis of disappearances in Mexico , where more than 130,000 people have gone missing, mostly in the last 20 years since the government declared its war on drug cartels. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Exclusive: Human rights group warns of ‘deep collusion’ between criminals and officials in some parts of country State actors are involved in disappearances in Mexico at an “alarming” rate, according to a report from the Inter-American Commission on Human Rights (IACHR). The sweeping investigation, to which the Guardian was given exclusive access, presents a dire picture of the crisis of disappearances in Mexico , where more than 130,000 people have gone missing, mostly in the last 20 years since the government declared its war on drug cartels. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 根據美洲人權委員會（IACHR）的一份報告，墨西哥的失踪事件正在以‘驚人的’速度發生，並且國家行為者與犯罪分子之間存在‘深度勾結’。該報告指出，自政府宣戰毒品卡特爾以來，已有超過130,000人失踪，這一危機主要發生在過去20年內。
briefing.background: 墨西哥的失踪問題已成為一個嚴重的人權危機，特別是在政府宣戰毒品卡特爾的背景下。這場戰爭導致了暴力的激增，並使得許多無辜民眾成為受害者。根據IACHR的報告，失踪事件的數量在過去二十年中持續上升，顯示出政府在打擊犯罪方面的無能與腐敗。報告強調，部分國家官員與犯罪組織之間的勾結，使得這一問題更加複雜和難以解決。
briefing.analysis: 該報告揭示了墨西哥政府在處理失踪案件方面的重大失誤，並指出國家機構的腐敗是導致這一危機的根本原因。人權組織對於政府的回應表示失望，認為缺乏有效的調查和懲處機制使得失踪事件屢禁不止。此外，報告中提到的‘深度勾結’暗示了官員與犯罪集團之間的利益交織，這可能使得未來的改革與治理更加困難。各方對於如何解決這一問題的看法存在分歧，政府可能會強調打擊犯罪的必要性，而人權團體則呼籲更透明的調查與問責機制。

economy.title: US Senate expected to confirm Kevin Warsh as next Federal Reserve chair
economy.summary: Warsh would succeed outgoing Fed chair Jerome Powell as Trump continues his push to influence the US central bank Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email The US Senate is expected to confirm Kevin Warsh this week as chair of the Federal Reserve , as Donald Trump continues his campaign to influence the world’s most important central bank. The Fed’s influence over the economy spans from the job market to mortgage rates, and its every move is carefully scrutinized by investors on Wall Street. Warsh’s confirmation comes at a turbulent time for the central bank, which has fallen under intense scrutiny from Trump for not lowering interest rates. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Warsh would succeed outgoing Fed chair Jerome Powell as Trump continues his push to influence the US central bank Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email The US Senate is expected to confirm Kevin Warsh this week as chair of the Federal Reserve , as Donald Trump continues his campaign to influence the world’s most important central bank. The Fed’s influence over the economy spans from the job market to mortgage rates, and its every move is carefully scrutinized by investors on Wall Street. Warsh’s confirmation comes at a turbulent time for the central bank, which has fallen under intense scrutiny from Trump for not lowering interest rates. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國參議院預計本週將確認凱文·沃什（Kevin Warsh）擔任聯邦儲備委員會（Fed）主席，接替即將卸任的傑羅姆·鮑威爾（Jerome Powell）。這一任命是在唐納德·特朗普（Donald Trump）持續推動影響美國中央銀行的背景下進行的。聯邦儲備的決策對經濟有深遠影響，從就業市場到抵押貸款利率，市場投資者對其每一步動作都高度關注。
briefing.background: 聯邦儲備委員會是美國的中央銀行，負責制定貨幣政策以促進經濟穩定與增長。近期，特朗普對聯邦儲備的批評主要集中在其未能降低利率上，這使得聯邦儲備在政策決策上面臨更大的壓力。沃什的任命正值經濟增長持平的時期，儘管市場對利率的變動十分敏感，但根據《經濟學人》的報導，當前經濟表現超出悲觀預期，顯示出一定的韌性。
briefing.analysis: 沃什的確認可能會改變聯邦儲備的政策走向，特別是在利率決策方面。特朗普希望透過沃什的任命來促進更低的利率，以刺激經濟增長，這與目前聯邦儲備的保守立場形成對比。參考報導指出，儘管聯邦儲備正在降低利率，但經濟增長仍然保持穩定，這可能使得沃什面臨兩難局面：一方面需要響應政治壓力，另一方面則需考量經濟實際狀況。未來，市場將密切關注沃什的政策取向及其對經濟的影響。

supporting_summaries: As the Federal Reserve cuts interest rates, growth is holding up

economy.title: Thinktank calls for ‘double lock’ England private rent cap to ease living costs
economy.summary: Influential IPPR proposes capping rents at whichever is lower of consumer price inflation or wage growth UK politics live – latest updates One of the thinktanks closest to the Labour government is urging ministers to introduce private sector rent controls in England, as the chancellor weighs up how to ease a surge in living costs caused by the Iran war. The Institute for Public Policy Research (IPPR) has published a paper calling for a rent “double lock”, which would link rent increases to either wages or inflation, depending on which was lower. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Influential IPPR proposes capping rents at whichever is lower of consumer price inflation or wage growth UK politics live – latest updates One of the thinktanks closest to the Labour government is urging ministers to introduce private sector rent controls in England, as the chancellor weighs up how to ease a surge in living costs caused by the Iran war. The Institute for Public Policy Research (IPPR) has published a paper calling for a rent “double lock”, which would link rent increases to either wages or inflation, depending on which was lower. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國智庫IPPR呼籲政府對私營租金實施雙重鎖定，以應對因伊朗戰爭引發的生活成本上漲。該提案建議將租金增長限制在消費者物價通脹或工資增長中較低者，旨在減輕民眾的經濟壓力。此舉正值財政大臣考慮如何應對生活成本激增之際。
briefing.background: 英國目前面臨著因伊朗戰爭引發的能源價格飆升，進而推高生活成本的挑戰。這一情勢使得政府必須考慮如何有效應對通脹壓力。IPPR的提案反映了對租金控制的需求，尤其是在工資增長緩慢的背景下，租金的上漲將進一步加劇家庭的經濟負擔。此提案的提出，顯示出在政治上對於生活成本問題的高度關注，尤其是在即將到來的選舉中，如何平衡經濟政策與民生需求將成為重要議題。
briefing.analysis: IPPR的提案可能會引發政府內部的不同聲音。一方面，支持者認為這是緩解生活成本壓力的必要措施，尤其是在通脹高企的情況下，限制租金增長將有助於保護低收入家庭。另一方面，反對者可能擔心租金管制會抑制市場供應，進而影響房地產投資和建設，最終可能導致租金上漲的惡性循環。此外，根據Nikkei Asia的報導，財政政策的應對可能會加劇通脹，這意味著政府在制定政策時需謹慎考量各種經濟指標的影響。The Economist則指出，全球通脹的上升可能會加劇這一問題，政府的應對策略需在控制通脹與促進經濟增長之間取得平衡。

supporting_titles: Fiscal policy response to Iran war risks worsening inflation: BIS chief
How high could global inflation go?
supporting_summaries: With luck, the Iran war won’t cause a recession. But the surge in energy prices will push up the cost of living

economy.title: Oil prices jump after Trump dismisses Iran proposal to end war
economy.summary: The Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively shut, severely disrupting global energy shipments.

briefing.news_focus: The Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively shut, severely disrupting global energy shipments.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 在特朗普駁回伊朗提出的結束戰爭提議後，霍爾木茲海峽的航道實質上被封閉，這對全球能源運輸造成了嚴重干擾，導致油價大幅上漲。
briefing.background: 霍爾木茲海峽是全球最重要的石油運輸通道之一，約有五分之一的全球石油貿易經過此地。近期因伊朗與美國之間的緊張關係加劇，導致該地區的安全形勢惡化，進一步影響了油價。特朗普的決策使得原本就不穩定的局勢更加複雜，並直接影響到全球能源市場的供應鏈。此外，隨著油價上漲，航空業也受到波及，許多航空公司面臨更高的燃料成本，進一步影響其經營狀況。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件中，特朗普的回應對伊朗的提議表示拒絕，顯示出美國對於中東政策的強硬立場，這可能會導致該地區局勢的進一步惡化。根據參考報導，霍爾木茲海峽的封閉不僅影響了油價，還導致航空業如Spirit Airlines等公司因燃料成本上升而面臨經營困難，甚至導致其倒閉。這顯示出能源價格的波動對其他產業的連鎖反應。此外，根據《經濟學人》的報導，隨著傳統能源的危機，對可再生能源的需求可能會因此上升，這可能成為未來能源市場的一個重要趨勢。

supporting_titles: Air travel was already miserable. Now we get to pay more for it! | Dave Schilling
Renewables are shining. The Iran war amplifies their appeal
supporting_summaries: Spirit Airlines helped turn flying into a fee-based nightmare. Now it’s gone, and fuel prices are soaring Forgive me for not mourning last week’s demise of Spirit Airlines, the company responsible for making flying absolutely terrible. Due to rising expenses and billions of dollars in debt, Spirit shut down abruptly last Saturday, stranding thousands of customers who were unaware that an entire business meant to transport them through the sky was about to shutter for good. Spirit was struggling for years , but it all got so much worse thanks to the soaring cost of jet fuel caused by the war in Iran and the crisis in the strait of Hormuz that halted the shipment of oil. It was bad enough being the country’s most ridiculed mode of conveyance outside of the Segway. But now it costs even more to suck that badly. Dave Schilling is a Los Angeles-based writer and humorist Continue reading...
